attacking_style: Launches attacks in final 1-5km of climbs, typically out of corners or after testing rivals' response earlier. Prefers short, explosive accelerations rather than sustained long-range efforts, often targeting bonus seconds rather than large gaps.
team_tactics: Sky/INEOS typically uses him as both protected rider and super-domestique, creating tactical ambiguity. Team sets controlled tempo on climbs but rarely commits full train; often left isolated on final climbs, expected to self-sufficiently respond to attacks.
terrain_preference: Excels in rolling time trials (14-40km) and sustained climbing (15-25min efforts). Vulnerable on very steep gradients (>10%) and technical wet descents. Altitude time trials show late-stage weakness after three-week fatigue.
vulnerability: Crashes frequently in wet/technical conditions (6+ documented incidents). Fades on steep gradients in final kilometers when fatigued. Loses explosive power after mechanicals requiring chase efforts. Age-related decline evident in back-to-back Grand Tours (Giro podium→Vuelta collapse).
key_patterns: Attacks in final kilometer after following wheels conservatively, prioritizing efficiency over early aggression (8+ observations)
Hunts intermediate sprint bonuses for GC positioning, professional time-stealing discipline throughout stage races (4 observations)
Crashes consistently in wet descending conditions; bike handling remains liability throughout career (6+ crashes documented)
Performs better when racing into form; early-season results poor but peaks mid-year for Grand Tours (Romandie→Dauphine→Tour pattern)
Holds elite ITT form into late 30s but loses 20-50 seconds to specialists on technical/steep sections (5+ TT observations)
Willing to attack teammates when hierarchy unclear; team prioritizes tactical flexibility over fixed leadership (Froome/Bernal incidents)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 Vuelta collapse (crashes, dropped early, worst GC finish) following 2023 Giro podium suggests inability to sustain two Grand Tours per season at age 37. Peak performances now limited to single targeted objective.
